hiring_philosophy: value of real-world experience and insights
what_good_looks_like: engaging in honest and insightful discussions
fostering a sense of community and collaboration
what_bad_looks_like: lack of engagement in community activities
failing to adapt to new tools and technologies

tpf_context:
The Product Folks (TPF) is a product management community with 250,000+ members.
Their team manages talent recruitment — they list PM and tech roles from companies like
Swiggy, Zomato, Paytm, Pine Labs, BharatPe, Zepto, Google, Razorpay, Meesho, CRED, and others.
Candidates apply or get referred to these roles through the TPF platform.

The TPF recruiter team:
- Screens and shortlists candidates for client companies
- Schedules and coordinates interviews between candidates and companies
- Communicates updates, feedback, and decisions to candidates
- Manages relationships with hiring companies
- Handles their own internal team hiring too

scenarios.message: Hi there, I applied for the Senior Product Manager role at Swiggy a few weeks back, but I haven't heard anything yet. I'm really excited about this opportunity and just wanted to check in on the status of my application. I hope to hear from you soon!
scenarios.ideal_response_tone: Thank you for reaching out, Ananya! We appreciate your patience, and we're currently reviewing applications; you’ll hear from us shortly.

I’m really passionate about the role and have been working on enhancing my skills since then. Would my application be reconsidered if I reapply? Thank you for your guidance!

I’ve taken some courses to strengthen my skills in the meantime and I’m eager to know if I can be considered again for similar roles. Thank you!

scenarios.message: Hi team, I hope everything is going well! I had previously applied for a Product Manager position at CRED but was not selected. Since then, I have gained more experience and insights, and I would love to know if I could be reconsidered if I reapply. Thanks for your help!
